name: 𝐁𝐋𝐀𝐂𝐊 𝐏𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑 𝐌𝐃
description: 𝐁𝐋𝐀𝐂𝐊 𝐏𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑 𝐌𝐃 - A Powerful Multi-Device WhatsApp Bot built by 𝑮𝒖𝒓𝒖𝑻𝒆𝒄𝒉 😎 to Enhance Your WhatsApp Experience

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID. Get it by running the bot locally or using the pairing page.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code (e.g., 254712345678)

MODE.description: Bot mode: 'public' (everyone can use) or 'private' (only bot owner)

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Auto-like WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Auto-view WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

AUTO_BIO.description: Auto-update bot profile bio every 10 minutes. Set true or false.

AUTO_REACT.description: Auto-react to incoming messages with random emojis. Set true or false.

APP_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL for keep-alive pings (e.g., https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com)

EXPIRY_DATE.description: Optional bot licence expiry date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Leave blank for no expiry.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Leave blank to use auto-provisioned Heroku Postgres, or supply your own (Neon, Supabase, etc.). Falls back to SQLite if empty.

NPM_CONFIG_LEGACY_PEER_DEPS.description: Tells npm to use legacy peer dependency resolution — required to resolve sharp/baileys version conflict.

NODE_OPTIONS.description: Node.js runtime flags. Limits memory to 512MB and enables GC.
